Based on your registration information, here is your preliminary eligibility status. Final eligibility is confirmed after review.

Supporting Documents

Required Documents

properties.label: Declaration
properties.value:
Declaration and Consent

Please read and accept the following declaration to submit your application.

properties.label: Declaration
properties.value:
I hereby declare that:

  1. All information provided in this application is true and accurate to the best of my knowledge.
  2. I understand that providing false information may result in disqualification and potential legal action.
  3. I authorize the Ministry of Agriculture to verify the information provided.
  4. I agree to comply with the terms and conditions of the program if selected.
  5. I consent to receiving SMS notifications regarding my application status.
  6. I understand that meeting eligibility criteria does not guarantee acceptance into the program.

options.label: I have read and accept the declaration above
